name: ask_user
description: Ask the user one or more questions and wait for their reply before continuing. Use it when you genuinely cannot proceed without a decision or missing information — not for routine confirmations. The session parks until the user answers; the reply comes back as this tool's result and you continue in the same session. Prefer questions[] with 2–4 concrete options per question (the user answers with one click); use the plain question field only for genuinely open-ended asks. ONE ask_user call per turn.

question.description: The question to put to the user. Be specific and self-contained.

questions.description: Structured form: 1–4 questions, each with selectable options. Mutually exclusive with question.

options.description: 2–4 mutually exclusive choices; omit for a free-text question.

label.description: Short choice text shown to the user.

allow_free_text.description: Also accept a typed answer besides the options.
